sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52031" key="kairodapisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιροδᾰπιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καῖρος, δάπις</etym>) <sense id="n52031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carpet-weaver</tr_>, Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:342" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">342</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
